description: Model must issue two tool calls in a single turn — one for weather and one for an exchange rate — without waiting for either to resolve first. Tests whether the model correctly batches independent tool calls rather than sequencing them.
prompt: I need two things at once: the current weather in Tokyo, and the exchange rate from GBP to JPY. Fetch both using the available tools.

toolDefinitions.name: get_weather
toolDefinitions.description: Retrieves the current weather conditions for a given location.

toolDefinitions.name: get_exchange_rate
toolDefinitions.description: Returns the current exchange rate between two ISO 4217 currency codes.
